name: My Agent
description: An AI assistant running on OpenClaw. Capable of research, coding, analysis, writing, and general conversation.

skills.name: General Conversation
skills.description: Engage in natural conversation, answer questions, provide information on a wide range of topics.

skills.name: Code Assistant
skills.description: Help with coding tasks including writing, reviewing, debugging, and explaining code.
examples: Write a Python function to sort a list

skills.name: Research & Analysis
skills.description: Conduct research, analyze information, summarize documents, and provide structured insights.
